sub_modules.bandpass_fir_tapline: Combinational next-state tap delay-line builder for valid input samples.
sub_modules.bandpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational hard-coded 101-tap signed coefficient ROM with exact benchmark coefficients.
sub_modules.bandpass_fir_mac: Combinational signed multiply-accumulate over all FIR taps using a 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.bandpass_fir_scaler: Combinational fixed-point output scaler using arithmetic right shift by 15 bits.
